title: 资料收集与需求分析 / Fact-Find & Needs Analysis
summary: 全面了解客户(KYC):收集财务状况、目标、风险承受等,做 FNA 作为推荐的合理基础并须书面。 / Know the client fully (KYC): gather financial position, goals and risk appetite; the needs analysis (FNA) forms the reasonable basis for advice and must be documented.

sections.heading: 收集什么
sections.body: 收入支出、资产负债、现有保障/投资、目标与时间、风险承受、家庭责任等,信息须充分且更新。

sections.heading: What to gather
sections.body: Income/expenses, assets/liabilities, existing cover/investments, goals and horizon, risk appetite, dependants — adequate and updated.

sections.heading: 为何重要
sections.body: FNA 是适当性的基础;信息不足不得贸然推荐,客户拒答应记录其影响。

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.body: FNA is the basis of suitability; do not recommend without adequate information, and document the impact if the client declines.

keyPoints: 全面了解客户(KYC) / Know your client (KYC)
FNA 是适当性合理基础 / FNA is the basis of suitability
信息不足不得贸然推荐 / No recommendation without adequate info
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Fact Finding and Needs Analysis
